goal: Replace blind free-text model_id entry in the Remediation Model Accounts tab with a checked-in YAML model catalog as source of truth — catalog API, capability-rich UI dropdowns, live Ollama discovery and remote Ollama pull (trigger + progress polling).

phases.goal: YAML model catalog is the parsed/validated source of truth in ampel-core, mapped onto existing ModelCaps — no API/UI yet.
definition_of_done: cargo test -p ampel-core remediation::model_catalog (serde round-trip + default + invalid-YAML fallback)

phases.goal: Catalog + Ollama discovery/pull reachable over HTTP, every call passing existing SSRF + air-gap gates.
definition_of_done: cargo test -p ampel-api model_catalog (air-gap hide external, SSRF reject internal, pull state machine)
reuses validate_model_account SSRF+air-gap, no bespoke copy
no unguarded outbound reqwest in new handler

phases.goal: Catalog-driven Model tab: provider->model dropdown with caps/cost, advanced custom-model escape hatch, Ollama pull-progress flow, fully i18n.
definition_of_done: make test-frontend (catalog dropdown, custom escape hatch, Ollama pull/poll)
new i18n keys across all locales (coverage green)

phases.goal: End-to-end hardening + docs: security gates proven across new surface; feature documented.
definition_of_done: docs explain adding a model + Ollama remote pull

summary: config/models.yaml catalog (claude/gemini/ollama/onnx) + ampel-core remediation::model_catalog: serde structs with #[serde(default)] graceful fallback, embedded DEFAULT_CATALOG_YAML via include_str!, load_catalog() file loader (missing->embedded default, invalid->empty), and CatalogModel::caps() mapping onto existing ModelCaps (modality/egress/output_contract/kind derived from ProviderKind; PerToken cost only when both Decimal prices present). 14 unit tests; clippy -D warnings + rustfmt clean. No API/UI yet.

ampel-api handlers/model_catalog.rs: GET /api/model-catalog (org-aware air-gap filter hides external providers), GET /ollama/tags, POST /ollama/pull + GET /ollama/pull/{id}/status. Ollama endpoints funnel through resolve_ollama_target -> load_authorized_account (authz verbatim from model_accounts) + assert_endpoint_safe (SAME shared SSRF guard, local_only exempt as validate) before any request; reqwest client redirect(none). Pull = background tokio task driving Ollama NDJSON stream into a module-level static PULL_JOBS registry (in-memory, owner-scoped status). Pure PullStatus state machine + air-gap filter + ndjson drain unit-tested (6 tests). bad_gateway(502) ctor added. Adversarial review: SSRF/authz/air-gap all correct; FOLLOW-UP: PULL_JOBS never evicts (slow unbounded growth) — add TTL cleanup in phase 3 or a bead. clippy -D warnings + fmt clean.
